body:
Hi Armaan,

Congrats again on accepting the offer! Before your start date, please complete the attached onboarding forms (I-9, W-4, direct deposit) in Workday by Friday, May 30. If you have questions about the I-9 identity documents, the HR portal FAQ covers the accepted forms.

Let me know if anything is unclear.

Best,
Dana Lopez
People Operations, Cloudflare
subject: Onboarding paperwork — action required by 5/30
